creator: freebsd@com.jkkn.dk
text:
Great..

Well in phar - they did in fact implement phar_path_check using re2c.

This is the file:
https://github.com/php/php-src/blob/master/ext/phar/phar_path_check.re

It is also included in the compiled version:
https://github.com/php/php-src/blob/master/ext/phar/phar_path_check.c
